seo.title: About | San Roku Ku
seo.description: San Roku Ku is a production company creating bold cinematic storytelling and supporting international productions across Japan, Europe, and the US.

hero.logoAlt: San Roku Ku film production company logo
hero.title: About San Roku Ku
hero.intro: San Roku Ku is a production company focused on bold, cinematic storytelling. We produce original films and support international productions filming abroad, with a deep understanding of the creative, logistical, and cultural realities of working across Japan, Europe, and the US. We believe strong cross-cultural collaboration leads to more honest and memorable cinema. From independent filmmakers to established studios, we help bring visions to the screen.

cards.title: Local Knowledge
cards.text: We understand the realities of filming across borders, from permits and unions to local customs and workflows. Whether you are navigating locations in Japan, Europe, or the US, we help keep your production efficient, focused, and practical.

cards.title: A Bridge Between Cultures
cards.text: Language and cultural gaps can slow productions down. We work in both Japanese and English and specialize in connecting international filmmakers with local crews, talent, and partners across Japan, Europe, and the US.

cards.title: End-to-End Production Support
cards.text: From early development through post-production, we manage the practical details so you can stay focused on storytelling. Our approach keeps productions organized, transparent, and creatively aligned from start to finish.

cards.title: Trusted Local Networks
cards.text: Through years of hands-on experience, we have built reliable relationships with crews, vendors, and production partners across Japan, Europe, and the US. Working with us gives you access to professionals who understand both local expectations and international standards.

cards.title: Clear and Practical Problem Solving
cards.text: Challenges are part of filmmaking. We stay calm under pressure and focus on practical solutions that keep productions moving without losing sight of the creative goal.

cards.title: Vision-Driven and Film-Focused
cards.text: Every project is approached with care for story, craft, and long-term value. We focus on work that can travel internationally while staying grounded in strong cinematic vision.
